notes: The only minor thing I noticed is: the max resolution available is 1920x1080 (my monitor's native is 3440x1440). I suspect it's just a limitation the game itself has and it doesn't affect gameplay at all - game scales just fine for me: it utilizes full screen's height with black borders on both sides of the screen, except the cut scenes, which render in 1920x1080 rectangle in the middle of the screen with black borders around it. Everything else (including controller support) seems to work perfectly out of the box.
title: HARDCORE MECHA

gpu: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050 Ti with Max-Q Design
notes: Apart from a few gliching background textures it runs super smooth
